text: A small white toothbrush sits on an surface.
A tray with pancakes, bacon, eggs, cucumbers, coffee and syrup.
A group of zebras standing in a field.
A man is suspended by ropes and is painting the side of the building.
A bowl about to be placed inside a microwave oven.
A BIRD ON A BRANCH RUFFLING ITS FEATHERS
A large passenger jet flying through a blue sky.
A boy and mother stand for a photo
a plane that is getting ready to land.
A man stands with his arms raised and a keyboard around his neck.
